Title: Block patient creation when required name is missing
Preconditions: User has create access in Patients
Steps: 1. Open Patients new form 2. Keep name empty 3. Fill optional fields 4. Submit save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save and shows validation for required field name

Title: Prevent duplicate identity document for different patient records
Steps: 1. Open Patients new form 2. Enter different patient name with same identity_document_number 3. Submit
ExpectedResult: System prevents cross-record identity duplication or flags conflict for review

Title: Prevent unauthorized access to another patient profile
Steps: 1. Login with restricted user 2. Try opening target patient record by search/filter 3. Attempt edit
ExpectedResult: Access to unrelated patient record is denied

Title: Create patient with valid demographic and identity data
Preconditions: User has create access in Patients
TestData: name='SEED Patient A', blood_type='A+', identity_document_number='SEED-ID-101', phone='SEED-9000000002'
Steps: 1. Open Patients new form 2. Enter valid fields including name 3. Save record
ExpectedResult: Patient record is saved and available for appointment/prescription/lab/IPD/billing linkage

Title: Block doctor profile creation when required name is missing
Preconditions: User has create access in Doctors
Steps: 1. Open Doctors new form 2. Leave name empty 3. Submit
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required name

Title: Reject invalid boundary value for experience years
Preconditions: User has create access in Doctors
Steps: 1. Open Doctors new form 2. Enter negative experience 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System rejects invalid boundary value for experience

Title: Prevent assignment of inactive doctor in appointment flow
Steps: 1. Open Appointments new form 2. Attempt selecting inactive doctor 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System prevents unsafe assignment of inactive doctor

Title: Create active doctor profile for downstream assignment
TestData: name='SEED Doctor A', specialization='Medical Oncology', experience=6
Steps: 1. Create doctor with valid details 2. Save 3. Open Appointments and verify doctor appears
ExpectedResult: Doctor profile is saved and selectable in appointment/referral flows

Title: Block appointment save when required doctor is missing
Steps: 1. Open Appointments new form 2. Select patient only 3. Enter date 4. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required doctor_id

Title: Block appointment save when required appointment date is missing
Steps: 1. Open Appointments new form 2. Select patient and doctor 3. Keep appointment date empty 4. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required appointment_date

Title: Prevent double-booking for same doctor and time slot
Steps: 1. Create first appointment for slot 2. Attempt second appointment with same doctor/date/time 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System prevents duplicate slot booking

Title: Create appointment with valid patient doctor and date
Steps: 1. Open Appointments new form 2. Fill valid required fields 3. Save
ExpectedResult: Appointment is created with generated appointment reference

Title: Block prescription save when required patient is missing
Preconditions: User has create access in Prescriptions
Steps: 1. Open Prescriptions new form 2. Enter prescription notes only 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required patient_id

Title: Reject prescription line with zero or negative quantity
Preconditions: Valid prescription header and product exist
Steps: 1. Create prescription for valid patient 2. Add line with quantity 0 3. Save/confirm
ExpectedResult: System rejects invalid line quantity

Title: Enforce allergy or interaction fail-safe before finalizing prescription
Preconditions: Patient has known allergy interaction marker
Steps: 1. Create prescription for allergy-risk patient 2. Add interacting drug line 3. Attempt finalize
ExpectedResult: System blocks or requires explicit fail-safe handling before finalization

Title: Create prescription with valid lines and dosing instructions
TestData: name='SEED-RX-003', patient_id='SEED-PAT-002', product_id='SEED-DRUG-002', quantity=2, dosage='BD', duration='5d'
Steps: 1. Create prescription header with patient 2. Add valid line fields 3. Save
ExpectedResult: Prescription and lines are saved and traceable to patient

Title: Block lab report save when required patient is missing
Steps: 1. Open Lab Reports new form 2. Enter reference/date only 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required patient_id

Title: Block lab report save when required date is missing
Preconditions: Lab user has create access and patient exists
Steps: 1. Open Lab Reports new form 2. Enter reference/patient 3. Keep date empty 4. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required date

Title: Prevent wrong-patient lab result attachment
Steps: 1. Open lab report for patient A 2. Attempt attach report belonging to patient B 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System prevents cross-patient lab result assignment

Title: Create lab report with valid required and referral fields
Steps: 1. Open Lab Reports new form 2. Fill valid required fields and referral 3. Save
ExpectedResult: Lab report is saved and linked to correct patient

Title: Prevent assigning occupied bed to a second active IPD case
Preconditions: Bed status is occupied by active IPD
Steps: 1. Open IPD Details new form 2. Select occupied bed 3. Save admission
ExpectedResult: System blocks conflicting bed assignment

Title: Prevent active-treatment update after discharge status
Steps: 1. Open discharged IPD record 2. Attempt to add active treatment/progress update 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System rejects invalid post-discharge active updates

Title: Prevent linking IPD admission to unrelated patient context
Steps: 1. Create IPD admission for patient A 2. Attempt to link appointment of patient B 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System prevents cross-patient admission linkage

Title: Create valid IPD admission with doctor ward and bed assignment
Steps: 1. Open IPD new form 2. Fill patient/doctor/ward/bed 3. Save
ExpectedResult: IPD admission record is created and traceable through lifecycle

Title: Block billing save when required patient is missing
Steps: 1. Open Billing new form 2. Enter IPD reference only 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required patient_id

Title: Reject negative billing line amount
Steps: 1. Create billing header 2. Add line with negative price 3. Save/finalize
ExpectedResult: System rejects invalid negative billing amount

Title: Prevent duplicate billing line for same service event
Steps: 1. Add billing line for appointment event 2. Add same event again 3. Finalize
ExpectedResult: System prevents duplicate charge posting

Title: Create billing with valid lines and accurate total
Steps: 1. Create billing header for patient 2. Add valid lines 3. Save and review total
ExpectedResult: Total amount equals sum of valid billing lines

Title: Block ward creation when required ward name is missing
Steps: 1. Open Ward Management new form 2. Leave name blank 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required name

Title: Block ward creation when required ward type is missing
Steps: 1. Open Ward Management new form 2. Enter name only 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required ward_type

Title: Prevent workflow usage of incomplete ward configuration
Preconditions: Ward created without complete planning context
Steps: 1. Attempt to use incompletely configured ward in bed/IPD planning 2. Save plan
ExpectedResult: System prevents unsafe use until ward setup is valid

Title: Create valid ward master for bed allocation planning
Steps: 1. Open Ward Management 2. Enter valid ward details 3. Save
ExpectedResult: Ward record is created and available for bed mapping

Title: Block bed creation when required bed number is missing
Steps: 1. Open Bed Management new form 2. Leave bed_number blank 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required bed_number

Title: Block bed creation when required ward is missing
Steps: 1. Open Bed Management new form 2. Enter bed number only 3. Save
ExpectedResult: System blocks save for missing required ward_id

Title: Prevent assigning one bed to multiple active patients
Preconditions: Bed already linked to active IPD admission
Steps: 1. Keep bed occupied in active IPD 2. Try assigning same bed to another patient 3. Confirm assignment
ExpectedResult: System prevents conflicting occupancy

Title: Create bed with valid ward linkage and status
Preconditions: Ward exists and user has create access
Steps: 1. Open Bed Management new form 2. Enter valid required fields 3. Save
ExpectedResult: Bed record is saved and appears in IPD assignment options
